subject: precedent agreement and fts-1 agreement for anr - supply link

emails.subject: Precedent Agreement and FTS-1 Agreement for ANR - Supply Link
emails.subject_base: Precedent Agreement and FTS-1 Agreement for ANR - Supply Link
emails.body: Precedent Agreement and FTS-1 Agreement for ANR Supply Link Attached below are the two documents supporting Gleason's participation in the Supply Link Expansion on ANR. Please review and comment ASAP. Could you confirm the the required volume in the event we go C.C. Also, please note the project and management out (June 2001) in Paragraph 4 of the Prescedent Agreement. I want to forward the proposed changes to ANR on Wednesday. chris

emails.subject: Re: Precedent Agreement and FTS-1 Agreement for ANR - Supply Link
emails.subject_base: Precedent Agreement and FTS-1 Agreement for ANR - Supply Link
emails.body: Re: Precedent Agreement and FTS-1 Agreement for ANR Supply Link Chris Does section 4(b)(i) indicate that if we fail to secure our management approval within 45 days after ANR is executing the agreement, then the agreement is terminated? If so, this looks like a "get out of jail free card" for us. Can we get legal to verify this.? Mitch From: Chris Meyer ECT 06/13/2000 05:05 PM

emails.subject: Re: Precedent Agreement and FTS-1 Agreement for ANR - Supply Link
emails.subject_base: Precedent Agreement and FTS-1 Agreement for ANR - Supply Link
emails.body: The answer is yes. I've had legal review the documents prior to you receiving them. chris From: Mitch Robinson ENRON 06/13/2000 05:33 PM
